productDisplayName: Esprit Women Lissomy Glam Silver Black Steel Watches

Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. What& rsquo s even better with the Lissomy is that you get a tool to shorten or lengthen the strap to suit your style. Case diameter: 18 mm Case thickness: 5 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Steel case with a fixed bezel and CZ crystal embellishments for added durability, style and comfort Steel strap with a butterfly clasp Durable, scratch-resistant mineral crystal glass Black dial with silver lines marking 2 to 4 o& rsquo clock and 8 to 10 o& rsquo clock, Roman numbers marking 6 and 12 o& rsquo clock and brand name above 6 o& rsquo clock Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistant, allowing you to use it when washing hands or your car
